subject: A small goblin figure crouched on rocky ground, dwarfed by the looming silhouette of a massive red dragon's head and neck rearing up behind it
description: A tiny goblin huddles on a rocky outcrop in the foreground, hunched and small, while behind it a colossal red dragon rears up with a serpentine neck and a wide-open, fang-lined maw. The dragon's scales catch deep crimson and shadowed black, and the whole frame is washed in a hot red-and-orange palette suggesting firelight or a hellish glow. Jagged spines run down the dragon's back. The goblin is rendered as a small dark silhouette with goblin-typical pointed features, posed as if speaking, threatening, or attempting to command the beast. The composition reads as scale-contrast horror-comedy: tiny figure, enormous menace.
foreground: small crouched goblin on a rocky ledge
background: towering red dragon with open jaws, jagged rocky terrain, hot crimson atmosphere
emotion: goblin posture reads as bold or shouting, dragon reads as menacing and looming
